MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: duncan macdonald, esq., 510.522.7910, for defendant beatriz chichoni; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BEATRIZ CHICHONI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
